title: Taxi Marina Hramina to Knin | Fixed €120 Transfer | TAXI Antonio
description: Private taxi and transfer from Marina Hramina to Knin. Fixed €120 per car, up to 4 passengers, door to door. Book direct with Antonio.
keywords: taxi marina hramina to knin, transfer marina hramina to knin, marina hramina to knin taxi, marina hramina to knin transfer

schema.name: Taxi Marina Hramina to Knin
schema.description: Private, fixed-price taxi and transfer from Marina Hramina to Knin, 120 euros per car for up to 4 passengers, door to door.

offers.description: One-way private transfer from Marina Hramina to Knin, per car for up to 4 passengers. Return 240 euros.

mainEntity.name: How much is a transfer from Marina Hramina to Knin?

acceptedAnswer.text: A fixed 120 per car for up to 4 passengers, one way, with tolls, fuel and luggage included. A return trip is 240.

mainEntity.name: Can you collect right at the marina?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. I meet you at the marina entrance or reception and help with your luggage, so you go straight from the pontoon to the car.

mainEntity.name: Can you time the transfer around my boat?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Send me your charter, check-in or departure time when you book and I plan the pickup around it.

mainEntity.name: How far in advance should I book?

acceptedAnswer.text: At least 2 hours ahead so I can confirm the car and your pickup time. For a sooner ride, call or WhatsApp me directly.
